title: apalatoa pubescens
intro: Apalatoa pubescens, also known as the 'Tongan breadfruit tree', is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Apalatoa pubescens include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
